summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hookah Shop MVP - backend APIs, frontend UI, and admin functionality all working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Create product returns 200 instead of 201 status code
minor_issues.impact: Minor - functionality works but HTTP status not standard

passed_tests: Products API returning 18+ products with proper filtering
Admin CRUD operations (create, edit, delete products)
Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
Shop page with category filtering working
Cart functionality: add, remove, update quantity, clear cart
Admin dashboard with product management table
